design_prompts.title: Elon Musk: Social Security Scandals & Legal Battles
design_prompts.prompt:
Design a striking typography cover image with the text 'Elon Musk: Social Security Scandals & Legal Battles' prominently displayed. 
            The typography should exude a modern, tech-inspired aesthetic, featuring sleek, futuristic fonts intertwined with subtle elements 
            like circuit patterns and legal motifs (e.g., gavel, scales of justice). 
            
            Incorporate a color scheme of deep blues and metallic silvers to convey professionalism and gravity. 
            The background should be a dark gradient with faint imagery of Social Security cards and legal documents, 
            symbolizing the intertwining themes of technology and legal scrutiny. 
            
            Ensure the composition balances the boldness of the text with the subtlety of the background elements, 
            creating an image that is both engaging and informative.
            
            Design Tips:
            • Typography: Choose a font that reflects a tech-savvy and authoritative tone. Consider using a sans-serif typeface with clean lines and a slight futuristic flair.
            • Color Palette: Deep blues and metallic silvers can evoke a sense of trust and modernity. Use gradients to add depth and dimension to the background.
            • Imagery: Subtly integrate elements like circuit patterns to represent technology, and legal symbols such as a gavel or scales to signify the legal challenges.
            • Composition: Center the text prominently, with background elements providing context without distraction. Use layering effects to create a sense of depth.

design_prompts.title: Mojo Dojo Casa House - Barbie Core Aesthetic
design_prompts.prompt:
Create a vibrant, Barbie-core inspired design featuring the iconic "Mojo Dojo Casa House" text in bold, 
            playful typography. The design should capture the essence of Ken's dream house with a perfect blend of 
            masculine and feminine aesthetics.
            
            Use a color palette of hot pink, electric blue, and metallic gold accents. The background should feature 
            geometric patterns reminiscent of 80s interior design, with subtle neon lighting effects and retro-futuristic 
            elements. Include small decorative elements like disco balls, palm trees, and geometric shapes.
            
            The typography should be bold and confident, using a mix of sans-serif and display fonts that evoke 
            both luxury and playfulness. Add subtle gradients and shadow effects to make the text pop against the 
            vibrant background.
            
            Design Tips:
            • Typography: Use bold, confident fonts with a mix of serif and sans-serif elements
            • Color Palette: Hot pink (#FF1493), electric blue (#00BFFF), metallic gold (#FFD700)
            • Imagery: Geometric patterns, disco elements, retro-futuristic shapes
            • Composition: Center-focused with balanced negative space

design_prompts.title: My Boat Doesn't Run on Thanks - Sarcasm Design
design_prompts.prompt:
Design a minimalist yet impactful typography piece featuring the text "My Boat Doesn't Run on Thanks" 
            in a clean, modern sans-serif font. The design should convey dry wit and sarcasm through subtle visual cues.
            
            Use a monochromatic color scheme with black text on a white or light gray background, with a single 
            accent color (perhaps a muted red or dark blue) for emphasis. The layout should be clean and uncluttered, 
            with the text as the primary focus.
            
            Add subtle nautical elements like a simple line drawing of a boat or anchor, but keep them minimal and 
            not distracting from the text. The overall aesthetic should be sophisticated yet approachable.
            
            Design Tips:
            • Typography: Clean, modern sans-serif with good spacing
            • Color Palette: Black, white, with one accent color
            • Imagery: Minimal nautical elements (boat, anchor)
            • Composition: Clean, centered layout with emphasis on readability
target_keywords: my boat doesn't run on thanks

immediate_actions: Focus on low-competition, high-search keywords (mojo_dojo_house, electricity_kills)
Create 5-10 designs per trending keyword for maximum coverage
Use consistent branding across all designs
Test different product types for each design category
content_strategy: Create design series around popular themes (Barbie core, dark humor, nostalgia)
Develop seasonal designs for trending events
Cross-promote designs across different product types
Use trending hashtags and tags for maximum visibility
technical_optimization: Optimize file sizes for different product types
Create high-resolution versions for large products
Test different color variations for A/B testing
Monitor performance and adjust strategy based on sales data
